languages.text: "Так вот кто громит мой медотсек... Представься перед своим Лордом-капитаном".
"So you're the one destroying my medicae facility... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Так вот кто громит мой медотсек... Представься перед своим Лордом-капитаном".

traits.locale_text: "So you're the one destroying my medbay... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."
"So you're the one destroying my medbay... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."
"So you're the one destroying my medbay... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."

languages.text: 「つまり、君こそが私のメッドベイを破壊しているのだな... 君は主の艦長に自分を現せ。」
languages.original_text: "So you're the one destroying my medbay... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「つまり、君こそが私のメッドベイを破壊しているのだな... 君は主の艦長に自分を現せ。」

languages.text: "Demek sıhhiye tesisimi mahveden sensin... Lord Kaptan'ına kendini tanıt."
languages.original_text: "So you're the one destroying my medicae facility... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Demek sıhhiye tesisimi mahveden sensin... Lord Kaptan'ına kendini tanıt."

languages.text: «Así que usted es quien está destruyendo mi instalación medicae... Preséntese ante su Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "So you're the one destroying my medicae facility... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «Así que usted es quien está destruyendo mi instalación medicae... Preséntese ante su Lord Capitán».

languages.text: “就是你毁了我的医疗设施……向你的舰长大人报上名来。”
languages.original_text: "So you're the one destroying my medicae facility... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “就是你毁了我的医疗设施……向你的舰长大人报上名来。”

languages.text: « C'est donc vous qui avez détruit mon installation de medicae... Présentez-vous à votre {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "So you're the one destroying my medicae facility... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « C'est donc vous qui avez détruit mon installation de medicae... Présentez-vous à votre {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: "Ihr habt also meine Medicae-Einrichtung zerstört ... Stellt Euch Eurem Lord Captain vor."
languages.original_text: "So you're the one destroying my medicae facility... Present yourself to your Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt also meine Medicae-Einrichtung zerstört ... Stellt Euch Eurem Lord Captain vor."
